<?php namespace Spatie\ErrorSolutions\SolutionProviders\Laravel; use RuntimeException; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Contracts\HasSolutionsForThrowable; use Spatie\ErrorSolutions\Solutions\Laravel\GenerateAppKeySolution; use Throwable; class MissingAppKeySolutionProvider implements HasSolutionsForThrowable { public function canSolve(Throwable $throwable): bool { if (! $throwable instanceof RuntimeException) { return false; } return $throwable->getMessage() === 'No application encryption key has been specified.'; } public function getSolutions(Throwable $throwable): array { return [new GenerateAppKeySolution()]; } }
